heredoc_for_file_modification is now RECURRING across two consecutive cycles; recommend a PreToolUse Bash hook that matches cat\s*>>.*<<.*EOF patterns and emits a block message redirecting to Edit tool; the irony of the pattern recurring specifically in the mistake-patterns correction ritual makes a targeted hook the only reliable prevention vector

search_variant_thrash (NEW) warrants an intra-session heuristic: if a second Bash grep attempt has greater than 60 percent regex overlap with the immediately preceding Bash grep attempt, that is a signal to pivot to the Grep tool and construct the pattern once correctly; recommend adding this to mistake-patterns.md
